name: OVARIAN HYPERSTIMULATION SYNDROME
definition: potentially life-threatening iatrogenic complication of ovulation induction / ovarian
dominant_finding: cysts with increased SI on T1WI (common) ← hemorrhage
distribution: "spoke-wheel" appearance of ovaries = bilateral symmetrically enlarged ovaries > 5 cm in
discriminating_features: "spoke-wheel" appearance of ovaries = bilateral symmetrically enlarged ovaries > 5 cm in
cysts usually anechoic, unless complicated by hemorrhage
ovarian cyst > 10 cm (100%): usually disappears after 20-40 days; may persist for 12-16

general: "spoke-wheel" appearance of ovaries = bilateral symmetrically enlarged ovaries > 5 cm in
cysts usually anechoic, unless complicated by hemorrhage
ovarian cyst > 10 cm (100%): usually disappears after 20-40 days; may persist for 12-16
MR: cysts with increased SI on T1WI (common) ← hemorrhage
↑ SI of ovarian stroma on T2WI ← edema
